title: You are an Architect. Review this set of 4 pipeline fixes for a Remotion video generation system. ## CHANGES 1. G2: COEIROINK speaker resolution — COEIROINKClient now uses request.speaker via COEIROINK_SPEAKER_MAP instead of ignoring it 2. G3: English→katakana TTS preprocessing — preprocessNarration...
summary_text: { "scores": { "accuracy": 1, "performance": 1, "maintainability": 1 }, "total": 3, "issues": [ { "severity": "critical", "file": "src/services/storage/index.ts", "line": "17-19", "description": "Workspace path is deterministic per day+topic, so reruns reuse the same `images/` directory. Combined with extension-priority injection (`png` before `svg`), stale assets can be injected into a new run.", "suggestion": "Make workspace unique per run (include time or random suffix), or clean `workspace/images` before generation, and prefer `generatedPaths` mapping over `existsSync` scanning." }, { "severity": "major", "file": "scripts/generate-video.ts", "line": "113-129", "description": "Image generation/injection has no graceful fallback path. If filesystem write/copy fails mid-phase, the pipeline aborts even though Remotion has a built-in gradient fallback for missing `imageFile`.", "suggestion": "Wrap [4/7] in try/catch; on failure, log warning and continue with script scenes without `imageFile` so rendering can still produce a watchable video." }, { "severity": "major", "file": "src/services/tts/synthesize-all.ts", "line": "140,167-170", "description": "TTS audio uses preprocessed katakana text, but COEIROINK timing estimation uses original narration text. This can create noticeable lip-sync drift when English terms are expanded.", "suggestion": "Use `narrationForTts` for `estimateMoraTimings` (or store both raw/display vs spoken text explicitly)." }, { "severity": "major", "file": "src/services/compose/compose.ts", "line": "207-208", "description": "`direction.image -> scene.imagePrompt` is propagated, but image generation still reads `direction` directly (`scripts/generate-video.ts:114`). This splits the source of truth and can diverge if script and direction drift.", "suggestion": "Drive image generation from `script.scenes[].imagePrompt` (post-compose contract) or remove `imagePrompt` from script if direction remains canonical." }, { "severity": "minor", "file": "src/services/tts/synthesize-all.ts", "line": "50-51", "description": "Replacement order contradicts 'longest match first': `/Git/g` runs before `/GitHub/gi`, so `GitHub` can be partially converted and miss the specific mapping.", "suggestion": "Reorder entries or enforce deterministic longest-first sorting for all dictionary rules." }, { "severity": "minor", "file": "src/services/image/orchestrator.ts", "line": "302-307", "description": "Provider-chain errors are swallowed silently, making it hard to diagnose whether output came from Freepik/OpenRouter/fallback SVG.", "suggestion": "Capture and log provider-level failures (at least in debug mode) and include provider name in generation logs." } ], "summary": "The 4 fixes are directionally coherent and mostly integrated, and the end-to-end path to Remotion rendering exists. However, current data flow is split (`imagePrompt` is not the operational source), image-phase failure handling is brittle, and COEIROINK lip-sync quality regresses under katakana preprocessing. A watchable video is usually achievable, but reliability and correctness under reruns/failures need hardening." }
